utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified with required details:
- health_coverage: The format asks for physical and mental health insurance with costs. The plan specifies physical_health (€210/month), mental_health (€120/month), plus an active_lifestyle add-on (€150/month) and a total. This is fully specified with costs.
- property_coverage: The format asks for home/contents insurance with costs. The plan provides a plan name and cost (€90/month). It doesn’t explicitly mention contents vs building, but it is labeled as home coverage with a cost; generally acceptable for the category. Considered specified with costs.
- travel_coverage: The format asks for travel insurance with costs. The plan provides a plan name and cost (€115/month). This is specified with costs.
- additional_services: The format asks for any enhancement services with costs. The plan lists extra wellness services (€50/month) and a claims advocacy service (€250 one-time). This is specified with costs.
- total_budget: The format asks for complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. The plan provides totals for all options selected and for health only, each with monthly and annual figures. While not an exhaustive breakdown per line item, it is a complete budget view including monthly and annual totals. Considered specified.
Therefore, all 5 items are included and sufficiently specified with costs.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes specific items: EliteCare Premium Plan (physical health), EliteCare Premium Mental Health Plan, Active Lifestyle & Wellness Enhancement Add-on, PrimeHome Premium Coverage, PrimeTravel Premium Plan, Extra Wellness Services, and Claims Advocacy Service. From the ground-truth ratings, we can directly match EliteCare Premium Plan under primary_health_coverage.physical_health (rating 6), EliteCare Premium Plan under mental_health (rating 3), PrimeHome Premium Coverage under property_protection.home_content (rating 6), PrimeTravel Premium Plan under mobility_coverage.travel_insurance (rating 6), and Claims Advocacy Service under general_services (rating 3). The items “Active Lifestyle & Wellness Enhancement Add-on” and “Extra Wellness Services” do not have exact matches in the ground-truth list, so they cannot be mapped.
